action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "We are in /app with a clean terminal. The task requires implementing fMRI encoding models in R, ensuring R is installed, and using provided data in fMRIdata.RData. We need to split the training data into train/validation/test (50/25/25 with seed 42), implement LASSO (CV, AIC, AICc) and Ridge (CV), compare models using correlation and MSE, and generate predictions for voxel 1 for the 120 validation images, writing them to /app/predv1.txt. We also need to produce /app/model_comparison.csv with model metrics. To make this computationally feasible within typical container limits, the model comparison will be performed on voxel 1 (which satisfies comparing models) while the prediction output explicitly requires voxel 1. We'll implement LASSO AIC/AICc using the glmnet path from the CV fit to avoid duplicate fitting. We'll check for R installation and install glmnet, then run an R script that performs the tasks and writes the required output files. Finally, we'll verify that predv1.txt has 120 lines and that the CSV exists.",
  "plan": "1) List files to confirm fMRIdata.RData presence. 2) Ensure R is installed; if not, install r-base via apt-get. 3) Install the glmnet package in R. 4) Create an R script run_models.R that: - Loads data, sets seed 42, partitions data 50/25/25. - Implements LASSO with CV and computes test correlation/MSE. - Uses the LASSO path to select lambda by AIC and AICc, computes associated metrics. - Implements Ridge CV and metrics. - Writes a model_comparison.csv with Model, Correlation, MSE, Lambda, Df for voxel 1. - Selects the best model by correlation (tie-break by MSE), trains it on full data for voxel 1, predicts on val_feat, clips predictions to [-100,100], and writes /app/predv1.txt with 120 lines. 5) Run the R script. 6) Verify outputs: count lines in predv1.txt and show the CSV header and a few rows.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -la
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "bash -lc 'command -v Rscript >/dev/null 2>&1 || (apt-get update && apt-get install -y r-base)'
",
      "duration": 20.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "Rscript -e "if (!requireNamespace('glmnet', quietly = TRUE)) install.packages('glmnet', repos='https://cloud.r-project.org')"
",
      "duration": 40.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > run_models.R << 'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(glmnet)
})

set.seed(42)

# Load data
load("fMRIdata.RData")

# Validate expected objects
required <- c("fit_feat","resp_dat","val_feat","loc_dat")
missing <- required[!sapply(required, exists)]
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing objects in fMRIdata.RData:", paste(missing, collapse=", ")))
}

n <- nrow(fit_feat)
idx <- sample(seq_len(n))
train_n <- round(0.5 * n)
val_n <- round(0.25 * n)
test_n <- n - train_n - val_n

train_idx <- idx[1:train_n]
val_idx <- idx[(train_n + 1):(train_n + val_n)]
test_idx <- idx[(train_n + val_n + 1):n]

X_train <- fit_feat[train_idx, , drop=FALSE]
X_val_int <- fit_feat[val_idx, , drop=FALSE]
X_test <- fit_feat[test_idx, , drop=FALSE]

y_train <- resp_dat[train_idx, 1]
y_val_int <- resp_dat[val_idx, 1]
y_test <- resp_dat[test_idx, 1]

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  if (sd(x) == 0 || sd(y) == 0) return(0)
  as.numeric(cor(x, y))
}

mse <- function(x, y) {
  mean((x - y)^2)
}

# LASSO with CV
lasso_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
lambda_lasso_cv <- lasso_cv$lambda.min
coef_lasso_cv <- as.matrix(coef(lasso_cv, s="lambda.min"))
df_lasso_cv <- sum(abs(coef_lasso_cv[-1, 1]) > 0)
pred_test_lasso_cv <- as.numeric(predict(lasso_cv, newx=X_test, s="lambda.min"))
corr_lasso_cv <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_cv)
mse_lasso_cv <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_cv)

# LASSO path from CV fit for AIC/AICc selection
fit_path <- lasso_cv$glmnet.fit
pred_train_path <- predict(fit_path, newx=X_train)
rss <- colSums((matrix(y_train, nrow=length(y_train), ncol=ncol(pred_train_path)) - pred_train_path)^2)
df_path <- fit_path$df
ntr <- length(y_train)
aic <- ntr * log(rss / ntr) + 2 * df_path
aicc <- aic + (2 * df_path * (df_path + 1)) / pmax(1, (ntr - df_path - 1))
aic[!is.finite(aic)] <- Inf
aicc[!is.finite(aicc)] <- Inf

i_aic <- which.min(aic)
lambda_lasso_aic <- fit_path$lambda[i_aic]
df_lasso_aic <- df_path[i_aic]
pred_test_lasso_aic <- as.numeric(predict(fit_path, newx=X_test, s=lambda_lasso_aic))
corr_lasso_aic <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aic)
mse_lasso_aic <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aic)

i_aicc <- which.min(aicc)
lambda_lasso_aicc <- fit_path$lambda[i_aicc]
df_lasso_aicc <- df_path[i_aicc]
pred_test_lasso_aicc <- as.numeric(predict(fit_path, newx=X_test, s=lambda_lasso_aicc))
corr_lasso_aicc <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aicc)
mse_lasso_aicc <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aicc)

# Ridge with CV
ridge_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha=0, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
lambda_ridge_cv <- ridge_cv$lambda.min
coef_ridge_cv <- as.matrix(coef(ridge_cv, s="lambda.min"))
df_ridge_cv <- sum(abs(coef_ridge_cv[-1, 1]) > 1e-8)
pred_test_ridge_cv <- as.numeric(predict(ridge_cv, newx=X_test, s="lambda.min"))
corr_ridge_cv <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_ridge_cv)
mse_ridge_cv <- mse(y_test, pred_test_ridge_cv)

# Create model comparison CSV
comp <- data.frame(
  Model = c("LASSO_CV","LASSO_AIC","LASSO_AICc","Ridge_CV"),
  Correlation = c(corr_lasso_cv, corr_lasso_aic, corr_lasso_aicc, corr_ridge_cv),
  MSE = c(mse_lasso_cv, mse_lasso_aic, mse_lasso_aicc, mse_ridge_cv),
  Lambda = c(lambda_lasso_cv, lambda_lasso_aic, lambda_lasso_aicc, lambda_ridge_cv),
  Df = c(df_lasso_cv, df_lasso_aic, df_lasso_aicc, df_ridge_cv)
)

write.csv(comp, "/app/model_comparison.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# Determine best model by highest correlation (tie-breaker: lowest MSE)
best_idx <- which.max(comp$Correlation)
ties <- which(comp$Correlation == comp$Correlation[best_idx])
if (length(ties) > 1) {
  best_idx <- ties[which.min(comp$MSE[ties])]
}
best_model <- comp$Model[best_idx]

# Train best model on full data for voxel 1 and predict val_feat (120 images)
X_full <- fit_feat
y_full <- resp_dat[, 1]

predict_on_val <- function(model_name) {
  if (model_name == "LASSO_CV") {
    fitcv <- cv.glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
    as.numeric(predict(fitcv, newx=val_feat, s="lambda.min"))
  } else if (model_name == "LASSO_AIC") {
    fit <- glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE)
    pred_train <- predict(fit, newx=X_full)
    rss_full <- colSums((matrix(y_full, nrow=length(y_full), ncol=ncol(pred_train)) - pred_train)^2)
    df_full <- fit$df
    nfull <- length(y_full)
    aic_full <- nfull * log(rss_full / nfull) + 2 * df_full
    aic_full[!is.finite(aic_full)] <- Inf
    i <- which.min(aic_full)
    lam <- fit$lambda[i]
    as.numeric(predict(fit, newx=val_feat, s=lam))
  } else if (model_name == "LASSO_AICc") {
    fit <- glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE)
    pred_train <- predict(fit, newx=X_full)
    rss_full <- colSums((matrix(y_full, nrow=length(y_full), ncol=ncol(pred_train)) - pred_train)^2)
    df_full <- fit$df
    nfull <- length(y_full)
    aic_full <- nfull * log(rss_full / nfull) + 2 * df_full
    aicc_full <- aic_full + (2 * df_full * (df_full + 1)) / pmax(1, (nfull - df_full - 1))
    aicc_full[!is.finite(aicc_full)] <- Inf
    i <- which.min(aicc_full)
    lam <- fit$lambda[i]
    as.numeric(predict(fit, newx=val_feat, s=lam))
  } else if (model_name == "Ridge_CV") {
    fitcv <- cv.glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=0, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
    as.numeric(predict(fitcv, newx=val_feat, s="lambda.min"))
  } else {
    stop("Unknown best model: ", model_name)
  }
}

pred_val <- predict_on_val(best_model)
pred_val <- pmax(-100, pmin(100, pred_val))

con <- file("/app/predv1.txt", open="wt")
writeLines(formatC(pred_val, digits=10, format="fg"), con)
close(con)

cat("Best model:", best_model, "\n")
cat("Wrote /app/predv1.txt with", length(pred_val), "predictions.\n")
cat("Wrote /app/model_comparison.csv.\n")
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "Rscript run_models.R
",
      "duration": 60.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "wc -l /app/predv1.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "head -n 5 /app/model_comparison.csv
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -la /app/predv1.txt /app/model_comparison.csv
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": true
}

The glmnet installation command appears to have been interleaved prematurely, so we should wait for R installation to complete, then ensure glmnet is installed, create the R script, run it to generate predictions and model comparison outputs, and verify the results.",
  "plan": "1) Wait for the ongoing apt-get installation to complete. 2) Verify that Rscript is installed; if not, attempt installation again. 3) Install the glmnet package in R. 4) Create or overwrite the R script implementing data partitioning, LASSO (CV, AIC, AICc) and Ridge CV for voxel 1, compute test correlation and MSE, write model_comparison.csv, select best by correlation (tie MSE), train on full data and generate predictions for val_feat, clip to [-100,100], and write /app/predv1.txt. 5) Run the script. 6) Verify that predv1.txt has exactly 120 lines and that model_comparison.csv exists with a header and entries.",

",

    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > run_models.R << 'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(glmnet)
})

set.seed(42)

# Load data
load("fMRIdata.RData")

# Validate expected objects
required <- c("fit_feat","resp_dat","val_feat","loc_dat")
missing <- required[!sapply(required, exists)]
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing objects in fMRIdata.RData:", paste(missing, collapse=", ")))
}

n <- nrow(fit_feat)
idx <- sample(seq_len(n))
train_n <- round(0.5 * n)
val_n <- round(0.25 * n)
test_n <- n - train_n - val_n

train_idx <- idx[1:train_n]
val_idx <- idx[(train_n + 1):(train_n + val_n)]
test_idx <- idx[(train_n + val_n + 1):n]

X_train <- fit_feat[train_idx, , drop=FALSE]
X_val_int <- fit_feat[val_idx, , drop=FALSE]
X_test <- fit_feat[test_idx, , drop=FALSE]

y_train <- resp_dat[train_idx, 1]
y_val_int <- resp_dat[val_idx, 1]
y_test <- resp_dat[test_idx, 1]

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  sx <- sd(x); sy <- sd(y)
  if (is.na(sx) || is.na(sy) || sx == 0 || sy == 0) return(0)
  as.numeric(cor(x, y))
}

mse <- function(x, y) {
  mean((x - y)^2)
}

# LASSO with CV
lasso_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
lambda_lasso_cv <- lasso_cv$lambda.min
coef_lasso_cv <- as.matrix(coef(lasso_cv, s="lambda.min"))
df_lasso_cv <- sum(abs(coef_lasso_cv[-1, 1]) > 0)
pred_test_lasso_cv <- as.numeric(predict(lasso_cv, newx=X_test, s="lambda.min"))
corr_lasso_cv <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_cv)
mse_lasso_cv <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_cv)

# LASSO path from CV fit for AIC/AICc selection
fit_path <- lasso_cv$glmnet.fit
pred_train_path <- predict(fit_path, newx=X_train)
rss <- colSums((matrix(y_train, nrow=length(y_train), ncol=ncol(pred_train_path)) - pred_train_path)^2)
df_path <- fit_path$df
ntr <- length(y_train)
aic <- ntr * log(rss / ntr) + 2 * df_path
aicc <- aic + (2 * df_path * (df_path + 1)) / pmax(1, (ntr - df_path - 1))
aic[!is.finite(aic)] <- Inf
aicc[!is.finite(aicc)] <- Inf

i_aic <- which.min(aic)
lambda_lasso_aic <- fit_path$lambda[i_aic]
df_lasso_aic <- df_path[i_aic]
pred_test_lasso_aic <- as.numeric(predict(fit_path, newx=X_test, s=lambda_lasso_aic))
corr_lasso_aic <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aic)
mse_lasso_aic <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aic)

i_aicc <- which.min(aicc)
lambda_lasso_aicc <- fit_path$lambda[i_aicc]
df_lasso_aicc <- df_path[i_aicc]
pred_test_lasso_aicc <- as.numeric(predict(fit_path, newx=X_test, s=lambda_lasso_aicc))
corr_lasso_aicc <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aicc)
mse_lasso_aicc <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aicc)

# Ridge with CV
ridge_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha=0, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
lambda_ridge_cv <- ridge_cv$lambda.min
coef_ridge_cv <- as.matrix(coef(ridge_cv, s="lambda.min"))
df_ridge_cv <- sum(abs(coef_ridge_cv[-1, 1]) > 1e-8)
pred_test_ridge_cv <- as.numeric(predict(ridge_cv, newx=X_test, s="lambda.min"))
corr_ridge_cv <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_ridge_cv)
mse_ridge_cv <- mse(y_test, pred_test_ridge_cv)

# Create model comparison CSV
comp <- data.frame(
  Model = c("LASSO_CV","LASSO_AIC","LASSO_AICc","Ridge_CV"),
  Correlation = c(corr_lasso_cv, corr_lasso_aic, corr_lasso_aicc, corr_ridge_cv),
  MSE = c(mse_lasso_cv, mse_lasso_aic, mse_lasso_aicc, mse_ridge_cv),
  Lambda = c(lambda_lasso_cv, lambda_lasso_aic, lambda_lasso_aicc, lambda_ridge_cv),
  Df = c(df_lasso_cv, df_lasso_aic, df_lasso_aicc, df_ridge_cv)
)

write.csv(comp, "/app/model_comparison.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# Determine best model by highest correlation (tie-breaker: lowest MSE)
best_idx <- which.max(comp$Correlation)
ties <- which(comp$Correlation == comp$Correlation[best_idx])
if (length(ties) > 1) {
  best_idx <- ties[which.min(comp$MSE[ties])]
}
best_model <- comp$Model[best_idx]

# Train best model on full data for voxel 1 and predict val_feat (120 images)
X_full <- fit_feat
y_full <- resp_dat[, 1]

predict_on_val <- function(model_name) {
  if (model_name == "LASSO_CV") {
    fitcv <- cv.glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
    as.numeric(predict(fitcv, newx=val_feat, s="lambda.min"))
  } else if (model_name == "LASSO_AIC") {
    fit <- glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE)
    pred_train <- predict(fit, newx=X_full)
    rss_full <- colSums((matrix(y_full, nrow=length(y_full), ncol=ncol(pred_train)) - pred_train)^2)
    df_full <- fit$df
    nfull <- length(y_full)
    aic_full <- nfull * log(rss_full / nfull) + 2 * df_full
    aic_full[!is.finite(aic_full)] <- Inf
    i <- which.min(aic_full)
    lam <- fit$lambda[i]
    as.numeric(predict(fit, newx=val_feat, s=lam))
  } else if (model_name == "LASSO_AICc") {
    fit <- glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE)
    pred_train <- predict(fit, newx=X_full)
    rss_full <- colSums((matrix(y_full, nrow=length(y_full), ncol=ncol(pred_train)) - pred_train)^2)
    df_full <- fit$df
    nfull <- length(y_full)
    aic_full <- nfull * log(rss_full / nfull) + 2 * df_full
    aicc_full <- aic_full + (2 * df_full * (df_full + 1)) / pmax(1, (nfull - df_full - 1))
    aicc_full[!is.finite(aicc_full)] <- Inf
    i <- which.min(aicc_full)
    lam <- fit$lambda[i]
    as.numeric(predict(fit, newx=val_feat, s=lam))
  } else if (model_name == "Ridge_CV") {
    fitcv <- cv.glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=0, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
    as.numeric(predict(fitcv, newx=val_feat, s="lambda.min"))
  } else {
    stop("Unknown best model: ", model_name)
  }
}

pred_val <- predict_on_val(best_model)
pred_val <- pmax(-100, pmin(100, pred_val))

con <- file("/app/predv1.txt", open="wt")
writeLines(formatC(pred_val, digits=10, format="fg"), con)
close(con)

cat("Best model:", best_model, "\n")
cat("Wrote /app/predv1.txt with", length(pred_val), "predictions.\n")
cat("Wrote /app/model_comparison.csv.\n")
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.2
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "Rscript run_models.R
",
      "duration": 120.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "wc -l /app/predv1.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "head -n 5 /app/model_comparison.csv
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -la /app/predv1.txt /app/model_comparison.csv
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}

      "keystrokes": "cat > run_models.R << 'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(glmnet)
})

set.seed(42)

# Load data
load("fMRIdata.RData")

# Validate expected objects
required <- c("fit_feat","resp_dat","val_feat","loc_dat")
missing <- required[!sapply(required, exists)]
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing objects in fMRIdata.RData:", paste(missing, collapse=", ")))
}

n <- nrow(fit_feat)
idx <- sample(seq_len(n))
train_n <- round(0.5 * n)
val_n <- round(0.25 * n)
test_n <- n - train_n - val_n

train_idx <- idx[1:train_n]
val_idx <- idx[(train_n + 1):(train_n + val_n)]
test_idx <- idx[(train_n + val_n + 1):n]

X_train <- fit_feat[train_idx, , drop=FALSE]
X_val_int <- fit_feat[val_idx, , drop=FALSE]
X_test <- fit_feat[test_idx, , drop=FALSE]

y_train <- resp_dat[train_idx, 1]
y_val_int <- resp_dat[val_idx, 1]
y_test <- resp_dat[test_idx, 1]

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  sx <- sd(x); sy <- sd(y)
  if (is.na(sx) || is.na(sy) || sx == 0 || sy == 0) return(0)
  as.numeric(cor(x, y))
}

mse <- function(x, y) {
  mean((x - y)^2)
}

# LASSO with CV
lasso_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
lambda_lasso_cv <- lasso_cv$lambda.min
coef_lasso_cv <- as.matrix(coef(lasso_cv, s="lambda.min"))
df_lasso_cv <- sum(abs(coef_lasso_cv[-1, 1]) > 0)
pred_test_lasso_cv <- as.numeric(predict(lasso_cv, newx=X_test, s="lambda.min"))
corr_lasso_cv <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_cv)
mse_lasso_cv <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_cv)

# LASSO path from CV fit for AIC/AICc selection
fit_path <- lasso_cv$glmnet.fit
pred_train_path <- predict(fit_path, newx=X_train)
rss <- colSums((matrix(y_train, nrow=length(y_train), ncol=ncol(pred_train_path)) - pred_train_path)^2)
df_path <- fit_path$df
ntr <- length(y_train)
aic <- ntr * log(rss / ntr) + 2 * df_path
aicc <- aic + (2 * df_path * (df_path + 1)) / pmax(1, (ntr - df_path - 1))
aic[!is.finite(aic)] <- Inf
aicc[!is.finite(aicc)] <- Inf

i_aic <- which.min(aic)
lambda_lasso_aic <- fit_path$lambda[i_aic]
df_lasso_aic <- df_path[i_aic]
pred_test_lasso_aic <- as.numeric(predict(fit_path, newx=X_test, s=lambda_lasso_aic))
corr_lasso_aic <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aic)
mse_lasso_aic <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aic)

i_aicc <- which.min(aicc)
lambda_lasso_aicc <- fit_path$lambda[i_aicc]
df_lasso_aicc <- df_path[i_aicc]
pred_test_lasso_aicc <- as.numeric(predict(fit_path, newx=X_test, s=lambda_lasso_aicc))
corr_lasso_aicc <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aicc)
mse_lasso_aicc <- mse(y_test, pred_test_lasso_aicc)

# Ridge with CV
ridge_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha=0, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
lambda_ridge_cv <- ridge_cv$lambda.min
coef_ridge_cv <- as.matrix(coef(ridge_cv, s="lambda.min"))
df_ridge_cv <- sum(abs(coef_ridge_cv[-1, 1]) > 1e-8)
pred_test_ridge_cv <- as.numeric(predict(ridge_cv, newx=X_test, s="lambda.min"))
corr_ridge_cv <- safe_cor(y_test, pred_test_ridge_cv)
mse_ridge_cv <- mse(y_test, pred_test_ridge_cv)

# Create model comparison CSV
comp <- data.frame(
  Model = c("LASSO_CV","LASSO_AIC","LASSO_AICc","Ridge_CV"),
  Correlation = c(corr_lasso_cv, corr_lasso_aic, corr_lasso_aicc, corr_ridge_cv),
  MSE = c(mse_lasso_cv, mse_lasso_aic, mse_lasso_aicc, mse_ridge_cv),
  Lambda = c(lambda_lasso_cv, lambda_lasso_aic, lambda_lasso_aicc, lambda_ridge_cv),
  Df = c(df_lasso_cv, df_lasso_aic, df_lasso_aicc, df_ridge_cv)
)

write.csv(comp, "/app/model_comparison.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# Determine best model by highest correlation (tie-breaker: lowest MSE)
best_idx <- which.max(comp$Correlation)
ties <- which(comp$Correlation == comp$Correlation[best_idx])
if (length(ties) > 1) {
  best_idx <- ties[which.min(comp$MSE[ties])]
}
best_model <- comp$Model[best_idx]

# Train best model on full data for voxel 1 and predict val_feat (120 images)
X_full <- fit_feat
y_full <- resp_dat[, 1]

predict_on_val <- function(model_name) {
  if (model_name == "LASSO_CV") {
    fitcv <- cv.glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
    as.numeric(predict(fitcv, newx=val_feat, s="lambda.min"))
  } else if (model_name == "LASSO_AIC") {
    fit <- glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE)
    pred_train <- predict(fit, newx=X_full)
    rss_full <- colSums((matrix(y_full, nrow=length(y_full), ncol=ncol(pred_train)) - pred_train)^2)
    df_full <- fit$df
    nfull <- length(y_full)
    aic_full <- nfull * log(rss_full / nfull) + 2 * df_full
    aic_full[!is.finite(aic_full)] <- Inf
    i <- which.min(aic_full)
    lam <- fit$lambda[i]
    as.numeric(predict(fit, newx=val_feat, s=lam))
  } else if (model_name == "LASSO_AICc") {
    fit <- glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=1, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE)
    pred_train <- predict(fit, newx=X_full)
    rss_full <- colSums((matrix(y_full, nrow=length(y_full), ncol=ncol(pred_train)) - pred_train)^2)
    df_full <- fit$df
    nfull <- length(y_full)
    aic_full <- nfull * log(rss_full / nfull) + 2 * df_full
    aicc_full <- aic_full + (2 * df_full * (df_full + 1)) / pmax(1, (nfull - df_full - 1))
    aicc_full[!is.finite(aicc_full)] <- Inf
    i <- which.min(aicc_full)
    lam <- fit$lambda[i]
    as.numeric(predict(fit, newx=val_feat, s=lam))
  } else if (model_name == "Ridge_CV") {
    fitcv <- cv.glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=0, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
    as.numeric(predict(fitcv, newx=val_feat, s="lambda.min"))
  } else {
    stop("Unknown best model: ", model_name)
  }
}

pred_val <- predict_on_val(best_model)
pred_val <- pmax(-100, pmin(100, pred_val))

con <- file("/app/predv1.txt", open="wt")
writeLines(formatC(pred_val, digits=10, format="fg"), con)
close(con)

cat("Best model:", best_model, "\n")
cat("Wrote /app/predv1.txt with", length(pred_val), "predictions.\n")
cat("Wrote /app/model_comparison.csv.\n")
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.2
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "Rscript run_models.R
",
      "duration": 60.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "",
      "duration": 30.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "wc -l /app/predv1.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "head -n 5 /app/model_comparison.csv
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -la /app/predv1.txt /app/model_comparison.csv
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}

>     aic_full <- nfull * log(rss_full / nfull) + 2 * df_full
>     aicc_full <- aic_full + (2 * df_full * (df_full + 1)) / pmax(1, (nfull - df_full - 1))
>     aicc_full[!is.finite(aicc_full)] <- Inf
>     i <- which.min(aicc_full)
>     lam <- fit$lambda[i]
>     as.numeric(predict(fit, newx=val_feat, s=lam))
>   } else if (model_name == "Ridge_CV") {
>     fitcv <- cv.glmnet(X_full, y_full, alpha=0, family="gaussian", standardize=TRUE, nfolds=5)
>     as.numeric(predict(fitcv, newx=val_feat, s="lambda.min"))
>   } else {
>     stop("Unknown best model: ", model_name)
>   }
> }
>
> pred_val <- predict_on_val(best_model)
> pred_val <- pmax(-100, pmin(100, pred_val))
>
> con <- file("/app/predv1.txt", open="wt")
> writeLines(formatC(pred_val, digits=10, format="fg"), con)
> close(con)
>
> cat("Best model:", best_model, "\n")
> cat("Wrote /app/predv1.txt with", length(pred_val), "predictions.\n")
